description: You are an Architectural Historian preparing a National Register of Historic Places (NRHP) nomination form for the 'Riverside Industrial Historic District'. Format the document at /home/ga/Documents/riverside_nrhp_nomination.odt, which is currently open in Calligra Words, to meet the guidelines in /home/ga/Desktop/nps_formatting_guidelines.txt. The final document must have 1.5-inch Left and 1.0-inch Right margins, a centered and bolded main title, 'Heading 1' style for Sections 7 through 10, and 'Heading 2' style for the five topical subheadings in Sections 7 and 8. Additionally, apply double spacing to the narrative paragraphs in Sections 7 and 8, insert a manual page break before Section 8, and insert the boundary map image from /home/ga/Desktop/historic_boundary_map.jpg below Section 10. Save the document upon completion.

metadata.title_text: NATIONAL REGISTER OF HISTORIC PLACES NOMINATION FORM
